properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 85/14

ISPS SECURITY INFORMATION
PLEASE BE INFORMED THAT THE CURRENT MARITIME SECURITY LEVEL IN ALL NORWEGIAN PORT FACILITIES IS LEVEL 2.
THE CHANGE OF SECURITY LEVEL HAS EFFECT FROM 24TH OF JULY AT LT 1450. 
SHIPS SHALL RESPOND WITHOUT UNDUE DELAY TO THIS CHANGE IN THE SECURITY LEVEL.

 NAVAREA XIX 85/14

ISPS SECURITY INFORMATION
PLEASE BE INFORMED THAT THE CURRENT MARITIME SECURITY LEVEL IN ALL NORWEGIAN PORT FACILITIES IS LEVEL 2.
THE CHANGE OF SECURITY LEVEL HAS EFFECT FROM 24TH OF JULY AT LT 1450. 
SHIPS SHALL RESPOND WITHOUT UNDUE DELAY TO THIS CHANGE IN THE SECURITY LEVEL.


 PREVIOUS HF WARNINGS ISSUED NAVAREA XIX 51/14
